name: unzer
description: Inspect Unzer payments and charges and create direct charges and refunds via the Unzer Payment API

envVars.name: UNZER_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Unzer private API key (s-priv-... for sandbox, p-priv-... for production), used as the HTTP Basic username

envVars.name: UNZER_API_PASSWORD
envVars.description: HTTP Basic password for the Unzer API — always empty, leave as the default empty string

tools.name: Get Payment
tools.description: Retrieve a payment resource with its state, amounts (total, charged, canceled, remaining), and linked transactions

paymentId.description: Payment ID (e.g. s-pay-1) or your order ID

tools.name: Get Charge
tools.description: Retrieve a specific charge transaction of a payment, including amount, status, and processing details

chargeId.description: Charge ID within the payment (e.g. s-chg-1)

tools.name: Create Charge
tools.description: Directly charge a payment type (one-step payment without prior authorization) using a payment type ID

amount.description: Charge amount in the currency's major units, e.g. 49.99

resources.description: Linked resources; must contain the payment type ID, e.g. {"typeId": "s-crd-..."}, and may include customerId

returnUrl.description: URL the customer is redirected to after completing the payment (required for redirect payment methods)

orderId.description: Your own order ID to correlate the payment

paymentReference.description: Reference text shown on the customer's statement

tools.name: Refund Charge
tools.description: Cancel (refund) a charge fully or partially, returning money to the customer

amount.description: Amount to refund in major units; omit to refund the full charge

paymentReference.description: Reference text for the refund shown to the customer

tools.name: Authorize Payment
tools.description: Reserve funds on a payment type without charging yet (first step of the two-step authorize-then-charge flow, e.g. charge on shipment); reservations are held for about 7 days

amount.description: Authorization amount in the currency's major units, e.g. 49.99

resources.description: Linked resources; must contain the payment type ID, e.g. {"typeId": "s-crd-..."}, and may include customerId

returnUrl.description: URL the customer is redirected to after completing the payment (required for redirect payment methods)

orderId.description: Your own order ID to correlate the payment

paymentReference.description: Reference text shown on the customer's statement

tools.name: Charge Authorization
tools.description: Capture a previously authorized payment, fully (empty body) or partially (with amount) — the second step of the authorize-then-charge flow

paymentId.description: Payment ID of the authorized payment (e.g. s-pay-1)

amount.description: Amount to capture in major units; omit to capture the full authorized amount

paymentReference.description: Reference text shown on the customer's statement

tools.name: Cancel Authorization
tools.description: Cancel (reverse) an uncaptured authorization fully or partially, releasing the reserved funds — distinct from refunding a charge

paymentId.description: Payment ID of the authorized payment (e.g. s-pay-1)

amount.description: Amount to reverse in major units; omit to cancel the entire authorization

prompts.title: Check payment status
prompts.prompt: Look up an Unzer payment I specify and summarize its state and the total, charged, canceled, and remaining amounts.

prompts.title: Refund a charge
prompts.prompt: Refund a charge on an Unzer payment I specify and confirm the refunded amount.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Unzer Payment API Setup

steps.title: Get Unzer API keys
steps.description: Request a free test account at https://docs.unzer.com/ (or sign an Unzer contract for production). You receive a key pair per environment: a public key (s-pub-... / p-pub-...) and a private key (s-priv-... / p-priv-...).

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Add UNZER_PRIVATE_KEY=s-priv-... (sandbox) or p-priv-... (production) to your .env. Leave UNZER_API_PASSWORD empty — the API authenticates with HTTP Basic using the private key as the username and an empty password.

steps.title: Create a payment type
steps.description: Charges require a payment type ID (e.g. s-crd-... for a card) created client-side via Unzer UI components or the payment types API, so that raw card data never touches your server.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run Get Payment with a known payment ID, or create a small test charge in sandbox with a test payment type ID.

notes: Never use the public key (s-pub-/p-pub-) for server-side calls; only the private key authenticates this API. Keep it secret.
Sandbox keys (s-priv-...) and production keys (p-priv-...) both target https://api.unzer.com — the key prefix determines the environment.
Amounts are in the currency's major units (e.g. 49.99 EUR).
